name: chunlv-esports
description: Chunlv Esports Companion Dispatch Management System

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @chunlv/shared build && pnpm --filter @chunlv/server build && pnpm --filter @chunlv/web build
scripts.deploy: git pull && pnpm install && pnpm --filter @chunlv/shared build && pnpm --filter @chunlv/server build && fuser -k 3001/tcp; pm2 restart chunlv-server --update-env
scripts.deploy:full: git pull && pnpm install && pnpm build && fuser -k 3001/tcp; pm2 restart chunlv-server --update-env
